summary: Tested all 9 features for the indigo AI app with Stability AI, MongoDB, and Firebase integrations. All tests passed successfully.

minor.issue: Returns compressed binary JSON causing 'Failed to check Google Drive status SyntaxError' in frontend console logs. Not user-blocking but logs noise.

critical_code_review_comments: Stability AI key warning shown in Image Generator ('Add your Stability AI API key in Settings') even though server has STABILITY_API_KEY set in .env - this is expected behavior since the UI key is user-provided and different from server-side key. Consider showing a different message when server key is configured.
Google Drive status check returning compressed binary causing JSON parse error in console - minor UX issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a Node.js/TypeScript Vite+Express full-stack at port 3000. Python FastAPI proxy on 8001 forwards /api/* to port 3000. MongoDB connected (indigo_ai db). All 3 image providers (Freepik, WaveSpeed, Stability AI) are working in UI and backend. Stability AI endpoint /api/image/stability/generate returns 4MB JSON with base64 image (works correctly). Firebase backup section with data-testid=firebase-backup-btn visible in Settings. No data-testid=hamburger-menu exists - use 'svg.lucide-menu, button:first-child' selector instead.

test_results.app_loads: PASS - Chat interface visible at root URL
test_results.settings_firebase_backup_btn: PASS - data-testid=firebase-backup-btn found with text 'Backup to Firebase'
test_results.image_generator_3_providers: PASS - Freepik Mystic, WaveSpeed, Stability AI all visible
test_results.stability_model_selector: PASS - Shows Stable Image Core, SD 3.5 Large, SD 3.5 Large Turbo, SD 3.5 Medium
test_results.stability_generate_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/image/stability/generate returns HTTP 200 with 4MB JSON (base64 image)
test_results.mongodb_connected: PASS - Logs show 'MongoDB connected for cloud sync' and 'Loaded 0 user records from MongoDB'
test_results.stability_api_functional: PASS - API responds correctly with generated image
